title: T-011 — Standard cost Server Actions (CRUD + approve + supersede + e-signature SHA-256, §8.2, §5.3)
prompt:
# T-011 — Standard cost Server Actions

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §8.2 Standard Costs endpoints; §5.3 21 CFR Part 11 e-signature SHA-256(approver_id || record_id || timestamp || PIN_proof); §11.2 V-FIN-STD-01..08; §13.1 standard_cost.approved event hook; §13.2 cost_per_kg dual ownership.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Actions for standard cost lifecycle: createDraft, submitForApproval, approve (with PIN re-verification + SHA-256 signature), supersede (effective_to + status='superseded' + create replacement draft), getByItem (current active), getAuditTrail. All actions: Zod validate, RBAC check (`fin.standard_cost.create/approve/supersede`), transactional, audit_events + cost_approval_audit rows on every transition, emit `standard_cost.approved` outbox event on approve.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs/_actions.ts`:
   - `createStandardCostDraft(input)` — requires `fin.standard_cost.create`. Sets status='draft'.
   - `submitForApproval(id)` — transitions draft → pending. Notifies finance managers via notification outbox.
   - `approveStandardCost(id, {pin_proof, reason})` — requires `fin.standard_cost.approve`. Server computes SHA-256(approver_id || id || now() || PIN_proof) — never logs raw PIN. Validates PIN against user's bcrypt-stored PIN hash. Transitions pending → approved. Sets approved_by, approved_at, approval_signature_hash, approval_reason. Emits `finance_outbox_events` row with event_type='finance.standard_cost.approved' (T-027 schema). Updates items.cost_per_kg via the finance-permitted UPDATE (T-010 policy). Writes cost_approval_audit row.
   - `bulkApproveStandardCosts(ids, {pin_proof, reason})` — same logic inside a transaction; partial-failure result.
   - `supersedeStandardCost(id, {supersede_date, new_draft_attrs})` — sets effective_to=supersede_date + status='superseded' on current approved, creates new draft row (returns new_draft_id). Atomic.
   - `getActiveStandardCostByItem(itemId)` — Drizzle SELECT WHERE status='approved' AND now() BETWEEN effective_from AND COALESCE(effective_to, 'infinity').
   - `getStandardCostAudit(id)` — read from cost_approval_audit.
2. Zod schemas in `_lib/schemas.ts`:
   - `standardCostCreateSchema` with V-FIN-STD-01 refine (effective_to > effective_from or NULL), V-FIN-STD-05 total > 0 if submitting for approval.
   - V-FIN-STD-06 warn flag (cost change >20% vs prior approved) — non-blocking in P1 per PRD warning severity.
   - V-FIN-STD-03/04 server-side: approve requires PIN + recompute hash.
3. Use `withOrgContext` HOF (foundation T-125) + sets `app.permissions` GUC (T-010 contract).

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs/_actions.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_lib/standard-cost-schemas.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_lib/signature.ts [create] (SHA-256 helper, Node crypto)
- apps/web/app/finance/_lib/__tests__/standard-cost-actions.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given a user without fin.standard_cost.approve, when approveStandardCost called, then ForbiddenError and no DB write.
- Given approveStandardCost commits, when row is read, then approval_signature_hash equals server-side sha256(approver_id || id || approved_at || pin_proof); raw PIN never logged. AND given PIN bcrypt mismatch, when approve invoked, then {ok:false, error:'PIN_MISMATCH'} and no state transition.
- Given approval succeeds, when finance_outbox_events row read, then event_type='finance.standard_cost.approved', payload includes required keys, idempotency_key is UUID v7. AND given approval succeeds, when items.cost_per_kg queried, then it equals approved total_cost / uom_kg_factor (D-FIN-9).
- Given supersede commits, when transaction inspected, then approved row's effective_to=date + status='superseded' AND a new draft row with effective_from=date exists. AND given any successful transition, when cost_approval_audit queried, then a row exists with transition + actor_id. AND given bulkApprove with 50 ids where 2 fail PIN, when result returned, then {approved: 48, failed: [{id, error:'PIN_MISMATCH'}]}.
_(AC count consolidated from 9→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: standard-cost-actions.test.ts seeds users with PIN bcrypt hashes; runs each scenario (approve happy path, PIN mismatch, RBAC denial, overlap-on-approve, supersede transactionality, bulk partial fail, outbox emission, cost_per_kg write via T-010 policy).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/_lib/__tests__/standard-cost-actions.test.ts && pnpm typecheck`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not log raw PIN values (PII + security).
- Do not compute SHA-256 client-side — server-only, Node crypto.
- Do not skip PIN re-verification when `finance_settings.critical_approval_pin_required=true`.
- Do not bypass the GIST exclusion check on approve — surface the constraint error to user (V-FIN-STD-02).
- Do not write items.cost_per_kg without the finance permissions GUC set (T-010 trigger will reject — design-for-failure here is intentional).
- Do not use REST — Server Actions only.
- Do not emit outbox event BEFORE the DB transaction commits (atomic outbox pattern).

pipeline_inputs.description: Server Actions for standard cost lifecycle: create/submit/approve/supersede/bulk-approve with PIN+SHA-256 e-signature + outbox emission + cost_per_kg dual-ownership write.
pipeline_inputs.details: Implements §8.2 endpoint contracts as Server Actions; §5.3 e-signature SHA-256 server-side using Node crypto; §13.1 outbox emission of finance.standard_cost.approved (consumed by Reporting MV refresh + 12-REPORTING dashboards); §13.2 cost_per_kg lifecycle write under T-010 trigger gate (requires app.permissions GUC). All transitions write cost_approval_audit. Bulk approve is transactional. [AC count consolidated from 9→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost)]
